"'''Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals'''" was an article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]]. Written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Abel G. Peña]], it covered the original thirteen [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admirals]]. It was [[Dirty Dozen: The Imperial Grand Admirals|originally]] going to be in an issue of ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' before the magazine was canceled.

==Contents==
*[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]
*[[Martio Batch]]
*[[Nial Declann]]

*[[Rufaan Tigellinus]]
*[[Demetrius Zaarin]]
